request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you hear about the recent security lapses in our cities? While we debate civil liberties, others are exploiting our openness. We can't afford to be naive. Stronger domestic security powers aren't about control - they're about protection. Our allies are already stepping up; shouldn't we do the same for our communities? #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurNeighbors
